project_type: Python FastAPI app with HTMX + DaisyUI/Tailwind UI
test_framework: pytest with pytest-asyncio, async tests, conftest.py fixtures
verification_instructions: 1. Run ruff check src/ to verify no lint errors. 2. Run pytest tests/ -x --ignore=tests/integration to verify all tests pass.
setup_instructions: pip install -e '.[dev]' or pip install -e . && pip install pytest pytest-asyncio httpx pytest-httpx
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon available. No external network for integration tests. Use unit tests only.
contribution_requirements: Code must pass ruff check src/. Tests use pytest-asyncio with asyncio_mode=auto.
key_patterns: Routes in src/maestro/api/routes/ui.py use FastAPI Depends() for auth. Templates are Jinja2 in src/maestro/ui/templates/. DaisyUI components used throughout. current_user (User model) already passed to all template contexts. Group permission checks happen in auth/dependencies.py using _require_any_group(). UserRepository.get_user_groups(user_id) returns list[Group] objects.
directory_structure: src/maestro/ = app code, src/maestro/api/routes/ = route handlers, src/maestro/auth/ = auth deps, src/maestro/ui/templates/ = Jinja2 templates, src/maestro/ui/templates/partials/ = partial templates for HTMX, tests/ = test files
